headline: Snowflake Summit 26 Puts Governed Enterprise AI At Center Stage
summary: Snowflake (NYSE:SNOW) used its Snowflake Summit 26 event to roll out a broad set of AI focused product launches and ecosystem integrations. The company highlighted new AI capabilities such as Horizon Context, CoWork enhancements, and Datastream aimed at production grade enterprise AI. Snowflake also announced deeper partnerships with firms including Anthropic, Cognizant, Collibra, Ataccama, RelationalAI, and ThoughtSpot. headline: Cognizant Accelerates Enterprise AI Adoption with Snowflake's Cortex-Powered Intelligent Agents
summary: Cognizant (Nasdaq: CTSH) and Snowflake today announced at Snowflake Summit 26 an expanded collaboration aiming to accelerate enterprise AI adoption through the Snowflake CoCo platform.
